headline: Stop the slide—today's discipline prevents weekend collapse
summary: You're -0.55 kg/week behind pace; today you must nail portion control and 45 minutes of cardio to arrest the slide before Friday.
details: Eat only Huel pre-portioned meals today—no emotional snacking, no exceptions. Hit the rowing machine for 45 minutes (or treadmill 30+ minutes) to create the deficit you didn't build last week. Today's discipline prevents Friday-Sunday sabotage; you've lost zero weight in seven days and cannot afford another weekend of drift.
